title: Producing and selling hemp - Canada.ca
content:
## Producing and selling hemp
Industrial hemp, application forms, permits and licences, industry information

## Services and information

### Apply for an industrial hemp licence
Licence application forms, how to apply, documents required.

### List of cultivars of industrial hemp
Licenced producers, approved cultivators, varieties, testing requirements.

### About hemp and Canada's hemp industry
Canadian hemp industry, hemp producers and processors, statistics, licences and permits, fact sheets.

### Hemp import and export licences and permits
Guidance documents, application forms for licences and permits.

### Hemp technical and policy documents
Technical requirements, legal scope, regulatory activities, documents, policies, regulations.

### Hemp and livestock feed
Regulations, labelling, ingredient description and composition, manufacturing process, safety data requirements

### Statistics, reports and fact sheets on hemp
Data on commercial licences, cultivars by province, statistical summaries.

### THC and viability testing requirements
Industrial Hemp Technical Manual, Standard Operating Procedures, Sampling, Testing and Processing Methodology.
- Canadian Food Inspection Agency
